_how_to_update: Add a new object to the TOP of 'entries' every time the hub ships a change. Shape: { date:'YYYY-MM-DD', emoji, title, items:[{type:'new'|'improved'|'fixed', text}] }. 'upcoming' is a plain list of strings shown as a 'Coming soon' card — announce UI changes BEFORE shipping them, then move them into a real entry when they land. changelog.html renders this file — no other edits needed.

items.text: ✨ Smarter search in Ask My Planner — turn it on and vague questions get matched by MEANING, not just exact words ('that spooky collab thing' finds the right card). One-time ~25 MB download, then it runs entirely in your browser; the instant answers stay instant, and keyword search still works if you leave it off.
🆚 Thumbnail A/B compare — score a thumbnail, hit 📌 Pin, score the other one, and get them side by side with the verdict and the biggest factor differences.

📤 'Sendable?' meter on the Media Kit — a completeness bar that says out loud when the kit is good enough to send (80%+), what the fastest wins are, and which bits are just nice-to-haves. Perfectionism doesn't get a veto anymore.
The Toolbox and What's New pages now sit on the exact same pastel canvas as every other page — no more odd-one-out backgrounds.

🪚 Task breaker — type the scary task, get small physical steps, choose how tiny to chop them. Knows creator tasks (editing, thumbnails, scripts, taxes, going live) and has a kind generic recipe for everything else.
🎭 Tone shifter — paste a message and nudge it more formal, more casual, softer, shorter, or less sorry (the hedge-remover for over-apologizers).
⚖️ Tone read — a heuristic read of how your message comes across, with receipts: it shows exactly which words triggered the verdict so YOU stay the judge.
⏳ Time guesser — honest time estimates with the real-brain buffer built in, plus a 'block this much' suggestion so finishing early beats running late.

Everything in the Toolbox runs on hand-written rules in your browser — nothing you type is sent anywhere. Inspired by goblin.tools (whose lovely AI versions live at goblin.tools); the brain-dump goblin already lives on the To-Do list.
The Toolbox got front-door parking: a quick strip right under the home page search jumps straight to each tool, plus its own tile in Plan & Organize and a spot in the menu under More.
🧘 Low-stim mode joins 🌙 dark, 📖 dyslexia-friendly, and 🟡 soft tint — calm colors, zero motion, decorative art hidden. One toggle, every page.

Home now has 'Jump back in' (the last 3 places you were, one click to resume) and 'One thing now' — exactly one suggested next action from your own planner, todos, and review history. With an '↻ another' button if it picked wrong.
🧠 Brain dump on the To-Do list: empty your head one line at a time (each saves instantly), then sort everything ONE task at a time — Today / This week / Someday / Let it go.

Planner cards have a '▸ very next action' field — the literal next physical step, shown on the card and on your editor's dashboard. Quiet cards (14+ days untouched) get a gentle 🌫 chip, and dates now always show 'in 3d' next to 'Jun 15'.
Weekly Review has a 🪷 one-question-at-a-time mode — same nine questions, one screen each, with dots showing where you are.

🎙️ Dictation mic on the hub's big text boxes (browser speech recognition — free, nothing leaves your machine) and the Optimizer now autosaves your draft inputs, so tab-away never loses a thought. The top title suggestion also gets a ⭐ Eggie's pick badge for low-decision days.
Your Habits energy check-in (🌙/🌤/🌞) now travels: on low-energy days the To-Do list gently suggests picking just one thing.

Kanban column headers explain exactly what each status means and who can see what. The Manager Hub states, in plain words, exactly what managers can and cannot access. Creator Memory shows exactly which tools read each part of your profile.
This page now has a 🔭 Coming soon card — interface changes get announced before they ship, never as a surprise.

Pitch Builder: a ⏰ follow-up radar flags sent pitches that have sat quiet for 7+ days, and a 🧰 scripts pack has send-ready wording for the hard moments — declining politely, raising your rate, asking for clarity, nudging a ghost.

Editors couldn't download files that were attached while a planner card was first being created (only files added to already-saved cards worked). The sharing rules now cover both — every file listed on a card you're assigned to downloads properly.
If a file genuinely isn't shared with your editor account, the editor dashboard now says so instead of suggesting a refresh that never helps.

entries.title: Optimizer V5 — one card, no steps

items.text: The Optimizer's 3-step wizard is gone. Everything is one card now: say what your short is about, optionally add a working title or your video, hit ✨ Optimize — score, critique, stronger titles, hashtag mix, and your post pack all come back in one flow.
Results lost their tabs too — suggestions and the copy-paste post pack stack right under your score, with the full score breakdown and resource library tucked into expandable sections.
Your inputs stay on screen next to the results, so you can tweak the title and re-optimize without starting over.
Sending a title over from the Planner now lands directly in the card — no step-hopping.
Install the hub like an app! On phone or desktop, your browser now offers 'Install / Add to Home Screen' — the hub opens in its own window and core pages keep working offline.
⚡ Quick idea capture — the menu on every page now has a 'Quick idea → Planner' button. Type a title, hit save, and it lands in your planner's Idea column without leaving the page you're on.
📜 This page! What's New keeps a running history of every hub update from now on.
The floating focus timer can now collapse into a tiny bubble — click – to shrink it, click the bubble to bring it back. It remembers your choice.
A new shared core (hub-core.js) powers all of this — future pages get the standard helpers and sign-in handling for free.

Switching browser tabs and coming back no longer reloads your data mid-edit on ANY page (it could silently wipe unsaved changes in Creator Memory, Weekly Review, Pitch Builder, Subathon setup, and more).
The 'Edited' status pill in the planner's view modal now has its proper green styling.
Editor emails are now normalized everywhere — editors with mixed-case emails could previously see an empty dashboard.
Ask-my-planner's server function queried two columns that didn't exist; manager view there works again.
Managers can now see a creator's Tweets planner and to-do categories (was silently empty before).
Internal docs corrected so future updates are built against the real database shape.
🎭 Debut Checklist — every step from 'I want to be a VTuber' to debut day, with progress saved to your account.
🔍 Niche Finder — a quiz that figures out your content × vibe recipe and saves it straight into Creator Memory.
⏱️ Subathon Planner — rules, goals, incentives, schedule and prep checklist, plus a live timer widget you can drop into OBS.
The Media Kit no longer resets your unsaved edits when you switch tabs and come back.
The Optimizer's title generator got a much bigger template bank, smarter batching, free synonym enrichment, and a 'show more' button.
The home page got its big redesign — tool tiles with search, grouped by what you're trying to do.
Media Kit — a shareable, public stats page for sponsors, with your branding.
Pitch Builder — writes your sponsor outreach (email, DM, follow-ups) from your media kit + Creator Memory.

Where it all started: the Shorts Optimizer and Content Planner core, then editors & delegation, manager co-ownership, To-Dos with focus timer, Sustainable Habits, Weekly Review, Ask My Planner, Finance & Tax, Growth Playbook, Creator Memory, accessibility modes, and the demo sandbox.
